ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_stats" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the date */,
  "deaths_per_100_cases" REAL /* Ratio of deaths to confirmed cases per 100 */,
  "recovered_per_100_cases" REAL /* Ratio of recovered cases to confirmed cases per 100 */,
  "deaths_per_100_recovered" REAL /* Ratio of deaths to recovered cases per 100 */,
  "countries_affected" INTEGER /* Number of countries with reported cases */,
  "tests_performed" INTEGER /* Total number of tests performed */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU admissions */,
  "vaccinations_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_doses" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccination doses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "healthcare_capacity" TEXT /* Healthcare capacity status */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region (e.g., continent, region) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the report is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the report */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the report */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the report */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases in the report */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the reported cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the reported cases */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the reported cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES daily_stats ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health worker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date for which the statistics are recorded
Number of new cases reported on the date
Ratio of deaths to confirmed cases per 100
Ratio of recovered cases to confirmed cases per 100
Ratio of deaths to recovered cases per 100
Number of countries with reported cases
Unique identifier for each case report
ID of the country the report is for
Number of confirmed cases in the report
Number of deaths in the report
Number of recovered cases in the report
Number of active cases in the report
Age group of the reported cases
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health worker, admin)
Location of the user (e.g., country, city)
